description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a rectangular footprint and a detached garage connected by a short breezeway. The exterior walls are clad in light tan brick, and the house features numerous multi-pane windows arranged in regular rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof is primarily flat with a slight pitch, and the garage has a gable roof. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch with white columns and a small overhang, adding a touch of classical design. The house includes multiple rooms visible from above, with interior walls painted in neutral tones and some rooms featuring built-in shelving. The overall design is spacious and symmetrical, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A large, two-story tan brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical window rows, and a detached gable-roofed garage. The main entry features a covered porch with white columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, white columns, and large multi-pane windows; the detached garage is visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, brick exterior, and a glimpse of the garage's gable roof; fewer windows are visible on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more symmetrical window rows, the connection to the garage, and the overall rectangular shape of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage doors, flat roof, and a single window on the side of the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a covered porch, white columns, and a small overhang
